prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-GOLDINGMOLD-500 Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor DIY 500 Gram Cast Iron Gold Ingot Mold to Make Your Own Gold Bars Description: The ASR Outdoor gold ingot mold is a great addition to any gold panner or prospector’s equipment. It is made of heavy-duty cast iron that is ideal for smelting and forming your own gold bars from your findings out in the field.

Each gold ingot mold holds up to 500 grams of gold nuggets and flakes. Apply heat and melt your own gold bar with ease (but make sure to completely cool the mold before removing the bar). The mold measures 6.5” in length which will create a sturdy rectangular gold bar, suitable for both smaller and larger capacity smelting.

Although our gold ingot mold was originally designed for gold prospecting and panning, these molds are also great for jewelry making, metalworking, casting, and other professional and hobby craft projects. This is a must-have mold for panners, prospectors, and jewelry makers alike. Search Terms: gold bar gold panning kit gold rush ingot molds cast iron pan pot jewelry making supplies jewelry casting supplies metal casting metal melting ingot mould arts and crafts crafting crafting supplies smelting furnace crucible jewelry making tools Features: - MAKE YOUR OWN INGOTS - ASR Outdoor gold ingot mold is made of heavy-duty cast iron to smelt and form your own gold bars; Great thermal conductivity ideal for gold panners and gold prospectors - 500 GRAM CAPACITY - Gold ingot mold holds up to 500 grams of gold flakes and nuggets; apply heat and melt your own gold from your gold prospecting findings; Make sure to cool completely before removal - RECTANGULAR BAR SHAPE - 6.5” long mold will create a sturdy, rectangle gold bar; Suitable for both small and larger capacity smelting - VERSATILE INGOT MOLD - Designed for gold panning and prospecting, gold ingot molds are also ideal for jewelry making, metalworking, smelting, metal casting, and other professional and hobby craft projects; Must-have mold for jewelry makers and crafters - SPECIFICATIONS - Dimensions: 6.5” long; Shape: rectangular bar; Capacity: up to 500 grams; Material: heavy duty cast iron; Weight: 1.29lbs (20.6oz); Color: black === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 500 Gram Cast Iron Gold Ingot Mold

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 500-g Cast Iron Black Gold Ingot Mold

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Cast Iron, 500 Gram Capacity, 65 Inch Rectangular Bar, Gold Panning, Jewelry Making, Metal Casting

openai.title_differentiation: 500 Gram Capacity, Heavy Duty Cast Iron, Rectangular Bar Mold, Great For Gold Panning, Jewelry Casting
